description_en: Inconsistent contact, ball flies erratically, no swing structure
description_id: Kontak tidak konsisten, bola melambung acak, tidak ada struktur ayunan

description_en: Makes contact ~6/10 in cooperative rally, no direction control, often into net
description_id: Kontak ~6/10 dalam rally lambat, tidak ada kontrol arah, sering ke net

description_en: Consistent crosscourt rally at moderate pace, basic depth control
description_id: Rally crosscourt konsisten dengan kecepatan sedang, kontrol kedalaman dasar

description_en: Controls direction & depth in match play, attacks short balls aggressively
description_id: Mengontrol arah & kedalaman dalam pertandingan, menyerang bola pendek secara agresif

description_en: Weapon shot — varies pace, spin, depth, direction at will under pressure
description_id: Pukulan andalan — variasi kecepatan, spin, kedalaman, arah sesuka hati di bawah tekanan

description_en: Uses forehand grip, weak block contact, can't drive
description_id: Menggunakan grip forehand, kontak blok lemah, tidak bisa mendrive

description_en: Switches grip but inconsistent contact, often hits with frame
description_id: Sudah mengganti grip tapi kontak tidak konsisten, sering menyentuh frame

description_en: Consistent block backhand crosscourt, limited topspin
description_id: Blok backhand crosscourt konsisten, topspin terbatas

description_en: Reliable in match play, drives backhand with depth, basic topspin
description_id: Andal dalam pertandingan, mendrive backhand dengan kedalaman, topspin dasar

description_en: Aggressive backhand with topspin, attacks down the line under pressure
description_id: Backhand agresif dengan topspin, menyerang down the line di bawah tekanan

description_en: Swings at the ball, frame contacts common, often pops up
description_id: Mengayun ke bola, kontak frame sering terjadi, bola sering melambung tinggi

description_en: Makes contact but no placement, short of net or floats
description_id: Berhasil kontak tapi tanpa penempatan, terlalu pendek atau mengambang

description_en: Consistent block volley, keeps ball low, basic placement
description_id: Blok voli konsisten, bola tetap rendah, penempatan dasar

description_en: Controls direction with cut, can attack or defend based on situation
description_id: Mengontrol arah dengan cut, bisa menyerang atau bertahan sesuai situasi

description_en: Penetrating volley with cut & placement, dictates points from net
description_id: Voli menembus dengan cut & penempatan, mendominasi poin dari net

description_en: Misses contact frequently, no grip change
description_id: Sering gagal kontak, tidak mengganti grip

description_en: Block contact but ball lacks pace, pops up
description_id: Kontak blok berhasil tapi bola kurang kencang, melambung

description_en: Consistent block backhand volley, keeps ball low
description_id: Blok backhand voli konsisten, bola tetap rendah

description_en: Controls direction, absorbs pace and redirects
description_id: Mengontrol arah, menyerap kecepatan dan mengarahkan ulang

description_en: Aggressive backhand volley with cut, attacks confidently
description_id: Backhand voli agresif dengan cut, menyerang dengan percaya diri

description_en: Inconsistent toss, double faults common, no direction control
description_id: Toss tidak konsisten, double fault sering, tidak ada kontrol arah

description_en: Gets serve in ~6/10, no placement, slow pace
description_id: Servis masuk ~6/10, tanpa penempatan, kecepatan lambat

description_en: Consistent serve in service box, can target T or wide occasionally
description_id: Servis konsisten ke kotak servis, sesekali bisa mengarah ke T atau lebar

description_en: Reliable placement, varies pace, uses slice
description_id: Penempatan andal, variasi kecepatan, menggunakan slice

description_en: Strategic serve — varies placement, pace, spin to set up next shot
description_id: Servis strategis — variasi penempatan, kecepatan, spin untuk menyiapkan pukulan berikutnya

description_en: Often misses, gets aced or returns short to opponent's volley
description_id: Sering gagal, kena ace atau pengembalian pendek ke area voli lawan

description_en: Returns over net but no placement, often goes to opponent's volley
description_id: Berhasil melewati net tapi tanpa penempatan, sering ke area voli lawan

description_en: Consistent return cross-court, keeps ball low, neutralizes serve
description_id: Pengembalian crosscourt konsisten, bola rendah, menetralisir servis

description_en: Returns with intent — can lob, chip, or drive based on serve quality
description_id: Mengembalikan dengan tujuan — bisa lob, chip, atau drive sesuai kualitas servis

description_en: Uses return as offensive weapon, attacks weak serves consistently
description_id: Menggunakan pengembalian sebagai senjata ofensif, menyerang servis lemah secara konsisten

description_en: Lobs too short or too long, often gets smashed
description_id: Lob terlalu pendek atau terlalu jauh, sering di-smash lawan

description_en: Inconsistent height & depth, gets smashed or hits out
description_id: Ketinggian & kedalaman tidak konsisten, di-smash atau keluar lapangan

description_en: Consistent depth & height, neutralizes opponent's net pressure
description_id: Kedalaman & ketinggian konsisten, menetralisir tekanan net lawan

description_en: Tactical lobs — varies depth & spin, sets up own counter-attack
description_id: Lob taktis — variasi kedalaman & spin, menyiapkan serangan balik sendiri

description_en: Lob is a weapon — perfect height & depth, mixes in offensive lobs
description_id: Lob adalah senjata — ketinggian & kedalaman sempurna, variasi lob ofensif

description_en: Doesn't recognize when to use it; uses smash or lets ball drop
description_id: Tidak tahu kapan menggunakannya; menggunakan smash atau membiarkan bola jatuh

description_en: Recognizes opportunity but inconsistent contact, often into net
description_id: Mengenali peluang tapi kontak tidak konsisten, sering ke net

description_en: Consistent contact with control, keeps ball deep, but loses net position often
description_id: Kontak konsisten dengan kontrol, bola dalam, tapi sering kehilangan posisi net

description_en: Controls direction & depth, maintains net position, slows opponents down
description_id: Mengontrol arah & kedalaman, mempertahankan posisi net, memperlambat lawan

description_en: Tactical bandeja — varies pace, spin, direction; offensive when needed
description_id: Bandeja taktis — variasi kecepatan, spin, arah; ofensif saat dibutuhkan

description_en: Confuses with bandeja, inconsistent contact, often goes long
description_id: Bingung dengan bandeja, kontak tidak konsisten, sering keluar

description_en: Recognizes when to use but contact inconsistent
description_id: Tahu kapan menggunakan tapi kontak tidak konsisten

description_en: Consistent contact with side spin, keeps ball in
description_id: Kontak konsisten dengan side spin, bola tetap masuk

description_en: Controls direction & spin, ball jumps out of court (good víbora)
description_id: Mengontrol arah & spin, bola melambung keluar lapangan (víbora bagus)

description_en: Devastating víbora — angles, spin, pace; finishes points consistently
description_id: Víbora mematikan — sudut, spin, kecepatan; secara konsisten menyelesaikan poin

description_en: Times poorly, often misses, hits net or out
description_id: Timing buruk, sering gagal, ke net atau keluar

description_en: Inconsistent timing, lacks power, opponent defends easily
description_id: Timing tidak konsisten, kurang tenaga, lawan mudah bertahan

description_en: Consistent smash on easy balls, basic power & direction
description_id: Smash konsisten pada bola mudah, tenaga & arah dasar

description_en: Powerful smash with placement, attacks defensive lobs effectively
description_id: Smash bertenaga dengan penempatan, efektif menyerang lob bertahan

description_en: Devastating smash — uses kick, flat, angles; finishes points off any lob
description_id: Smash mematikan — kick, flat, sudut; menyelesaikan poin dari lob apapun

description_en: Doesn't read ball off back wall, late or rushed
description_id: Tidak membaca bola dari dinding belakang, terlambat atau terburu-buru

description_en: Reads ball but contact inconsistent, often hits weak return
description_id: Membaca bola tapi kontak tidak konsisten, sering pukulan balik lemah

description_en: Reads back wall well, returns ball to neutral position
description_id: Membaca dinding belakang dengan baik, mengembalikan bola ke posisi netral

description_en: Uses back wall to attack — sets up offensive shots from defense
description_id: Menggunakan dinding belakang untuk menyerang — menyiapkan pukulan ofensif dari posisi bertahan

description_en: Master of back wall — can chiquita, lob, or drive based on opportunity
description_id: Master dinding belakang — bisa chiquita, lob, atau drive sesuai peluang

description_en: Confused by side wall, often misses ball or contacts late
description_id: Bingung dengan dinding samping, sering gagal atau kontak terlambat

description_en: Reads side wall but rushed, returns weakly
description_id: Membaca dinding samping tapi terburu-buru, pukulan balik lemah

description_en: Reads side wall consistently, returns ball to neutral
description_id: Membaca dinding samping secara konsisten, mengembalikan ke posisi netral

description_en: Uses side wall to attack — sets up counter from corner shots
description_id: Menggunakan dinding samping untuk menyerang — menyiapkan serangan balik dari sudut

description_en: Comfortable with all wall combinations (back + side), creates winners
description_id: Nyaman dengan semua kombinasi dinding (belakang + samping), menciptakan winner

description_en: Drops too high or no spin, easy attack for opponent
description_id: Bola terlalu tinggi atau tanpa spin, mudah diserang lawan

description_en: Inconsistent drop — sometimes too short, often too high
description_id: Drop tidak konsisten — kadang terlalu pendek, sering terlalu tinggi

description_en: Consistent low drop, opponent has to move forward to retrieve
description_id: Drop rendah konsisten, lawan harus maju untuk mengambil

description_en: Tactical use — recognizes good moments, varies placement
description_id: Penggunaan taktis — mengenali momen yang tepat, variasi penempatan

description_en: Drop is a weapon — surprises opponents, sets up traps
description_id: Drop adalah senjata — mengejutkan lawan, membuat jebakan

description_en: Stands behind service line, gets lobbed easily, no awareness
description_id: Berdiri di belakang service line, mudah dilob, tidak ada kesadaran posisi

description_en: Stays at net but loses position after first volley, doesn't recover
description_id: Bertahan di net tapi kehilangan posisi setelah voli pertama, tidak recover

description_en: Holds net in steady rallies, loses position under sustained pressure
description_id: Mempertahankan net dalam rally stabil, kehilangan posisi di bawah tekanan berkelanjutan

description_en: Maintains aggressive net position, recovers after bandeja, partners coordinate
description_id: Mempertahankan posisi net agresif, recover setelah bandeja, berkoordinasi dengan pasangan

description_en: Dominates net consistently, dictates points, perfect positioning vs all opponents
description_id: Mendominasi net secara konsisten, mendikte poin, posisi sempurna menghadapi semua lawan

description_en: Stays at baseline reactively, no court coverage awareness
description_id: Diam di baseline secara reaktif, tidak ada kesadaran cakupan lapangan

description_en: Knows to retreat when lobbed but slow recovery, gaps with partner
description_id: Tahu harus mundur saat dilob tapi lambat recover, ada celah dengan pasangan

description_en: Defends consistently, covers most of court with partner
description_id: Bertahan secara konsisten, menutup sebagian besar lapangan bersama pasangan

description_en: Active defense — sets up counter-attack, communicates with partner
description_id: Pertahanan aktif — menyiapkan serangan balik, berkomunikasi dengan pasangan

description_en: Defensive maestro — turns defense to offense reliably, never out of position
description_id: Maestro bertahan — mengubah bertahan menjadi menyerang secara andal, tidak pernah salah posisi

description_en: Hits whatever shot first comes to mind, often wrong choice
description_id: Memukul pukulan pertama yang terlintas, sering pilihan yang salah

description_en: Recognizes 'easy' shots but unsure on tough decisions
description_id: Mengenali pukulan 'mudah' tapi ragu pada keputusan sulit

description_en: Reasonable shot choices in routine situations
description_id: Pilihan pukulan masuk akal dalam situasi rutin

description_en: Smart shot selection — chooses based on opponent position, score, momentum
description_id: Pemilihan pukulan cerdas — memilih berdasarkan posisi lawan, skor, dan momentum

description_en: Strategic mastermind — every shot has purpose, sets up patterns 2–3 shots ahead
description_id: Pemikir strategis — setiap pukulan ada tujuannya, menyiapkan pola 2–3 pukulan ke depan

description_en: No communication, plays as if alone on court
description_id: Tidak ada komunikasi, bermain seolah sendirian di lapangan

description_en: Basic communication ('mine!', 'out!') but no strategic talk
description_id: Komunikasi dasar ('bola saya!', 'keluar!') tapi tidak ada obrolan strategi

description_en: Communicates routinely, switches when needed
description_id: Berkomunikasi secara rutin, berganti posisi saat diperlukan

description_en: Coordinates strategy, plans points together, supports partner emotionally
description_id: Berkoordinasi strategi, merencanakan poin bersama, mendukung pasangan secara emosional

description_en: Synchronized play — telepathic positioning, consistent partnership
description_id: Permainan sinkron — penempatan posisi seperti telepati, kemitraan yang konsisten

description_en: Stays at baseline even when chance to attack, or rushes net poorly
description_id: Tetap di baseline meski ada peluang menyerang, atau maju ke net dengan buruk

description_en: Recognizes when to come up but timing poor, gets caught in transition
description_id: Tahu kapan harus maju tapi timing buruk, terjebak dalam transisi

description_en: Comes to net at appropriate times, basic transition execution
description_id: Maju ke net pada waktu yang tepat, eksekusi transisi dasar

description_en: Smooth transition — uses bandeja/lob to set up net, recovers if pushed back
description_id: Transisi mulus — menggunakan bandeja/lob untuk mempersiapkan net, recover jika dipukul mundur

description_en: Master of transition — flips defense to offense seamlessly, controls tempo
description_id: Master transisi — mengubah bertahan menjadi menyerang dengan mulus, mengendalikan tempo

description_en: Reactive only, doesn't anticipate opponent's shots
description_id: Hanya reaktif, tidak mengantisipasi pukulan lawan

description_en: Reads obvious patterns but slow to adapt
description_id: Membaca pola yang jelas tapi lambat beradaptasi

description_en: Anticipates routine situations, makes decent guesses
description_id: Mengantisipasi situasi rutin, membuat perkiraan yang cukup baik

description_en: Reads opponent well, anticipates shots based on position & body language
description_id: Membaca lawan dengan baik, mengantisipasi pukulan berdasarkan posisi & bahasa tubuh

description_en: Elite anticipation — reads serve placement, set-ups, knows next shot before opponent hits
description_id: Antisipasi elite — membaca penempatan servis, set-up, mengetahui pukulan berikutnya sebelum lawan memukul

description_en: Slow, flat-footed, often arrives too late or off-balance
description_id: Lambat, kaki datar, sering terlambat tiba atau tidak seimbang

description_en: Improving movement but inefficient, takes wrong steps
description_id: Pergerakan membaik tapi tidak efisien, mengambil langkah yang salah

description_en: Consistent split step & basic court coverage, occasional inefficiency
description_id: Split step konsisten & cakupan lapangan dasar, sesekali tidak efisien

description_en: Efficient movement, cross-step & shuffle, balanced contact
description_id: Pergerakan efisien, cross-step & shuffle, kontak seimbang

description_en: Elite footwork — anticipates, recovers fast, always in balance
description_id: Footwork elite — mengantisipasi, recover cepat, selalu seimbang

description_en: No split step, flat-footed, late reactions
description_id: Tidak ada split step, kaki datar, reaksi terlambat

description_en: Inconsistent split step, sometimes too early or late
description_id: Split step tidak konsisten, kadang terlalu awal atau terlambat

description_en: Consistent split step on opponent's contact, decent reactions
description_id: Split step konsisten saat lawan kontak, reaksi cukup baik

description_en: Reliable split + first-step explosiveness in match play
description_id: Split andal + langkah pertama eksplosif dalam pertandingan

description_en: Elite reactions — perfect timing, explosive first step, dominates short balls
description_id: Reaksi elite — timing sempurna, langkah pertama eksplosif, mendominasi bola pendek

description_en: Tired after 30 minutes, can't sustain quality in long rallies
description_id: Lelah setelah 30 menit, tidak bisa mempertahankan kualitas dalam rally panjang

description_en: Lasts a set but quality drops in second set
description_id: Bertahan satu set tapi kualitas menurun di set kedua

description_en: Plays 2 full sets at same level, tires in third
description_id: Bermain 2 set penuh di level yang sama, kelelahan di set ketiga

description_en: Sustains quality across 3 sets, occasional fatigue late
description_id: Mempertahankan kualitas sepanjang 3 set, sesekali kelelahan di akhir

description_en: Tournament-ready endurance, maintains intensity in long matches & multi-day events
description_id: Stamina siap turnamen, mempertahankan intensitas dalam pertandingan panjang & event multi-hari

description_en: Lacks pace on shots, slow movement
description_id: Kurang kecepatan pada pukulan, pergerakan lambat

description_en: Decent power on easy balls, breaks down under pressure
description_id: Tenaga cukup pada bola mudah, drop saat di bawah tekanan

description_en: Solid power on groundstrokes, average on overheads
description_id: Tenaga solid pada groundstroke, rata-rata pada overhead

description_en: Powerful shots & explosive movement, can finish points
description_id: Pukulan bertenaga & pergerakan eksplosif, bisa menyelesaikan poin

description_en: Elite power — generates pace from any position, dominates physically
description_id: Power elite — menghasilkan kecepatan dari posisi manapun, mendominasi secara fisik

description_en: Loses focus quickly, distracted easily, mistakes after errors
description_id: Cepat kehilangan fokus, mudah terganggu, kesalahan berlanjut setelah error

description_en: Focused in spurts but drops off when behind or tired
description_id: Fokus sebentar-sebentar tapi menurun saat ketinggalan atau lelah

description_en: Maintains focus in routine matches, struggles in long sessions
description_id: Mempertahankan fokus dalam pertandingan rutin, kesulitan dalam sesi panjang

description_en: Stays focused in close matches, recovers quickly after distractions
description_id: Tetap fokus dalam pertandingan ketat, cepat recover setelah gangguan

description_en: Laser focus — present every point, locked in for entire match
description_id: Fokus penuh — hadir di setiap poin, terkunci sepanjang pertandingan

description_en: Visibly affected by errors, body language drops, plays worse when behind
description_id: Terlihat terpengaruh error, bahasa tubuh merosot, bermain lebih buruk saat ketinggalan

description_en: Recovers slowly after mistakes, plays safer when behind
description_id: Lambat recover setelah kesalahan, bermain lebih aman saat ketinggalan

description_en: Maintains form in routine pressure, struggles in tight scores
description_id: Mempertahankan performa dalam tekanan rutin, kesulitan saat skor ketat

description_en: Performs well in close sets, makes smart choices at 5–5
description_id: Tampil baik dalam set ketat, membuat pilihan cerdas saat 5–5

description_en: Thrives in pressure — raises level when match is on the line
description_id: Berkembang dalam tekanan — meningkatkan level saat pertandingan kritis

description_en: Slow decisions, hesitates, often hits wrong shot
description_id: Keputusan lambat, ragu-ragu, sering memukul pukulan yang salah

description_en: Improving but still slow on tough decisions
description_id: Membaik tapi masih lambat pada keputusan sulit

description_en: Reasonable decisions in routine situations
description_id: Keputusan masuk akal dalam situasi rutin

description_en: Quick & accurate decisions in match play, rarely wrong shot
description_id: Keputusan cepat & akurat dalam pertandingan, jarang memilih pukulan yang salah

description_en: Lightning decisions — pattern recognition, intuitive shot selection
description_id: Keputusan secepat kilat — pengenalan pola, pemilihan pukulan intuitif

description_en: Errors compound — one mistake leads to several more
description_id: Kesalahan bertambah — satu kesalahan memicu beberapa kesalahan berikutnya

description_en: Slow to recover from errors, lingering frustration
description_id: Lambat recover dari kesalahan, frustrasi berkepanjangan

description_en: Recovers within 1–2 points after mistakes
description_id: Recover dalam 1–2 poin setelah kesalahan

description_en: Bounces back immediately, uses errors as feedback
description_id: Langsung bangkit, menggunakan kesalahan sebagai umpan balik

description_en: Unshakeable — plays better after adversity, mental warrior
description_id: Tidak tergoyahkan — bermain lebih baik setelah kesulitan, pejuang mental
